What I Do

The problems I solve and what that looks like in practice

🔥

The Problem

  • HR infrastructure that can't scale with the business
  • Compliance gaps that create legal and financial exposure
  • Payroll and leave programs running on manual processes
  • HRIS data nobody trusts for decisions
  • People teams that react instead of lead
⚙️

How I Solve It

  • Builds centralized, scalable People Operations models
  • Designs governance frameworks and compliance controls
  • Modernizes HRIS and automates manual workflows
  • Establishes payroll governance and absence management programs
  • Develops and coaches high-performing HR teams
✅

The Result

  • Zero compliance violations across 7 years and 5 jurisdictions
  • HR operations that scale without adding headcount
  • Leaders who trust their data and make faster decisions
  • Employee experience that reflects the company's values
  • A People team that's seen as a strategic partner

About

13+ years of progressive People Operations leadership across high-growth global companies

🏗️ Centralizing & Scaling People Operations

Built centralized, shared services HR models from the ground up at global SaaS companies — owning the full employee lifecycle, payroll governance, absence management, and compliance infrastructure across distributed, multi-state workforces.

📋 Payroll & Absence Management Governance

Led payroll operations governance and absence management programs at scale — establishing performance standards, serving as escalation point for complex FMLA/ADA situations, and ensuring consistent, people-centered service delivery across complex regulatory environments.

⚙️ HR Technology & Modernization

Deep HRIS expertise across Workday, Rippling, ADP Workforce Now, and SAP SuccessFactors. I use automation and workflow design to eliminate manual work, reduce operational risk, and build the data infrastructure leaders need to make confident decisions.

🌍 Multi-State Compliance & Governance Frameworks

Zero compliance violations over 7 years managing HR operations across 5 international jurisdictions. Built governance control frameworks, policy lifecycle programs, and compliance calendars that held the standard through multiple restructurings and leadership transitions.

Beyond the Resume

The story behind 13 years in People Operations

🎓 How I got here

I started as a Criminal Justice major at SF State because I wanted to give back to my community and be a positive role model. During an internship with the San Mateo County Domestic Violence Unit, something shifted — I realized my calling wasn't in the courtroom. It was in the workplace. The same drive to protect people, advocate for fairness, and create safe environments translated directly into HR. I just didn't know it yet.

After graduating, I moved to LA to chase the career — and pursued my Certificate in Human Resource Management at Cal State Long Beach while working. I started at Quiksilver and Pacific Dental Services, learning how large organizations operated — processes, departments, the full employee lifecycle for retail and healthcare companies. A job offer from VF Corporation (The North Face, lucy, JanSport) brought me back to the Bay Area, which led to Dolby, and eventually into the startup world. It was a strong foundation. But I wanted more than the beginning and the end.

🚀 The startup years

I stepped away from large corporations and dove into the startup world — four startups before landing at Ridecell, six total across my career. Each one taught me something the last one couldn't. I got to touch every part of HR, not just onboarding and offboarding. Compliance, immigration, benefits, payroll, culture, systems — all of it. I took the best practices from each company and built my own flavor: processes rigorous enough to hold up legally, human enough to actually work, and efficient enough to scale.

That approach is what I brought to Ridecell — where I stayed for 7 years and did my best work.

🌎 Life outside of work

I'm originally from the SF Bay Area — it's home base and where I return every quarter. I split my time between San Francisco, Puerto Vallarta, and Toronto, spending time with family, friends, and exploring. Remote work has given me the flexibility to do meaningful work from anywhere while staying rooted in the Bay.

My dog Lizzy is a local celebrity in PV — she rides on my back wherever I go and has her own fan club. She's basically my co-founder.

I'm also a photographer at heart — I love capturing candid moments and special memories. I became the unofficial company photographer at Ridecell, always showing up with my camera (and selfie stick) to make sure no great moment went undocumented.

Lizzy 🐶

PV local celebrity

📍 SF Bay Area (home base) · Returns quarterly 🐾 Dog mom to Lizzy ✈️ Splits time: SF · Puerto Vallarta · Toronto 🎓 Criminal Justice to People Ops 🏢 4 Startups before Ridecell · 6 total 🍳 Cooks to decompress 📷 Company photographer & memory keeper

Featured Projects

Three enterprise examples of the strategic execution behind my metrics

HRIS Modernization

ADP → Rippling HRIS Migration

The Challenge Legacy ADP infrastructure couldn't support a growing US + India workforce or the automation workflows leadership needed for scale.

The Action Led full migration from ADP to Rippling across US and India simultaneously—handling complete data mapping, workflow architecture design, multi-nation compliance configuration, and cross-functional team training.

The Result Achieved zero data loss and zero payroll disruption. Successfully automated 3 core HR workflows post-migration, slashing manual engineering processing time by over 60%.

💡 Key Takeaway: Modernizing systems isn't just about switching platforms; it’s about rebuilding the workflows from scratch to eliminate legacy human-error bottlenecks entirely.
Organizational Transformation

Post-M&A People Ops Integration

The Challenge Joined a 500+ employee AI SaaS company mid-acquisition. The legacy HR infrastructure was highly fragmented, compliance posture was entirely unknown, and HRIS data integrity was poor.

The Action Executed a rigorous 60-day full-scope compliance audit, completely rebuilt the corporate governance framework, stabilized fragmented HRIS structures, and cleanly aligned HR workflows across the newly combined global organization.

The Result Secured 100% policy compliance signature completion, established audit-ready I-9 recordkeeping, and seamlessly delivered a highly scalable target operating model within 90 days.

💡 Key Takeaway: Success in M&A integrations relies on extreme transparency and swift, structured data stabilization in the first 60 days to retain trust during massive organizational changes.
HR Technology

AI-Powered HR Automation Suite

The Challenge High-volume HR transactions (offboarding, severance, multi-state new hire processing) were completely manual, error-prone, and consuming massive amounts of core People team bandwidth.

The Action Engineered 3 custom Claude-powered HR automation tools—the Severance Agreement Drafter, New Hire EAF, and Offboarding EAF—fluidly integrated across Notion, Gmail, and Rippling ecosystems.

The Result Completely eliminated manual legal drafting for 3 high-risk transaction types, shrunk operational processing time from hours to minutes, and locked in absolute legal consistency across all outputs.

💡 Key Takeaway: AI shouldn't replace the human touch in HR; it should absorb the redundant administrative friction so the People team can focus entirely on high-value human problems.

AI & Automation

I don't just use AI — I build with it

🤖

Built 3 production HR automation tools using Claude AI

Integrated with Notion · Gmail · Rippling
Severance Agreement Drafter Generates compliant severance docs in minutes — reducing legal drafting time and ensuring consistency across all separations
New Hire Employee Action Form (EAF) Automates new hire data collection and routing — triggers Rippling onboarding, Notion records, and Gmail welcome sequences simultaneously
Offboarding Employee Action Form (EAF) End-to-end offboarding automation — system access revocation prompts, equipment retrieval, final pay coordination, and HRIS updates in a single workflow

What I Managed End-to-End

  • Primary liaison between immigration counsel and employees — coordinating filings, timelines, and documentation
  • Managed H-1B cap lottery filings for 8 consecutive years — coordinating registrations, petition prep, RFE responses, extensions, and amendments across a distributed global workforce
  • Supported green card sponsorship process from PERM through I-485 in coordination with outside counsel
  • Tracked all visa expiration dates, work authorization deadlines, and I-94 records to prevent lapses
  • Briefed employees and dependents on status changes, travel risks, and EAD renewal timelines
External Counsel Coordination: Served as the primary internal point of contact between employees and outside immigration counsel at both Ridecell and Prezent AI — ensuring accurate, timely regulatory submissions and a consistent employee experience throughout the immigration process.

📄 I-9 & E-Verify Program Management

Owned and governed the full I-9 compliance program across distributed US workforces — establishing document retention protocols, internal audit procedures, reverification tracking, and audit-ready recordkeeping. Achieved 100% reverification compliance and zero violations across 7+ years.

I-9 Compliance E-Verify LawLogix I-9 Advantage Document Retention

📋 Policy Lifecycle & Handbook Management

Authored and maintained employee handbooks across 5 international jurisdictions — aligned with FLSA, FMLA, ADA, ACA, PWFA, CFRA, and multi-state and India labor law. Enforced 100% policy acknowledgment signature completion and managed annual review cycles.

FLSA FMLA / CFRA ADA ACA PWFA Multi-State India Labor Law

📈 Compliance Calendar & Mandatory Training

Built and maintained the annual People compliance calendar — administering mandatory training programs including Prevention of Sexual Harassment, Privacy & Security, and Workplace Violence Prevention. Achieved 100% employee completion rates across all programs.

Sexual Harassment Prevention Privacy & Security Training Workplace Violence Prevention EasyLlama Terranova EEO-1 Reporting Compliance Calendar

Supported SOC 2 audit readiness and internal/external compliance audits — preparing comprehensive documentation packages, responding to audit inquiries, and building the evidence library needed to demonstrate HR operational controls to auditors and executive leadership.

SOC 2 Readiness Internal Audit External Audit Documentation Control Frameworks

👨‍⚒️ FLSA & Wage & Hour Compliance

Conducted annual FLSA exemption reviews, job classification audits, and wage and hour audits — providing actionable risk mitigation recommendations to leadership and enforcing time and attendance policies in partnership with Payroll to reduce regulatory exposure.

FLSA Exemption Analysis Job Classification Audits Wage & Hour Time & Attendance

Managed HR compliance across California, Colorado, Texas, and international jurisdictions — navigating state-specific leave laws, pay transparency requirements, and local employment regulations. Served as the primary internal compliance advisor across all active US states and global offices.

California Colorado Texas Washington Arizona New York Florida New Jersey Iowa Idaho Oregon Michigan Georgia Alabama North Carolina South Carolina Nevada Pay Transparency Multi-State Leave Global Compliance

My Philosophy on Distributed Teams

“Distance doesn’t create disconnection — a lack of intention does. My job is to design the systems, rituals, and moments that make every employee feel like they’re at the center of the company, not on the edge of it.”

— Catherine Nolasco, SHRM-CP

How It Works

↓
2
Auto-Routed in Jira
Ticket created, categorized by type — benefits, compliance, onboarding, offboarding, payroll
↓

↓
✓
Resolved & Closed

📋 Jira as System of Record

Configured Jira Service Management as the backbone — custom request types, SLA tracking, priority queues, and full searchable history of every HR interaction.

Jira Service MgmtSLA Tracking

💬 Slack Integration

Connected Jira to #ask-people in Slack so employees could submit requests conversationally with auto-notifications keeping both sides in sync.

Slack#ask-people

✉️ Email Integration

Email-to-ticket routing so any email to the People Ops inbox auto-generated a Jira ticket — critical for India team members and async email preferences.

Email-to-TicketAsync-Friendly

Intake forms and routing rules for every People Ops type: benefits, new hire setup, offboarding, policy, payroll discrepancies, I-9 support, and leave.

Rippling Implementation & Architecture

How I built Rippling into a single source of truth for People Operations — US and India, fully automated

Before Rippling
  • Justworks for US payroll — limited automation
  • Separate India payroll vendor, no integration
  • Manual onboarding checklists in spreadsheets
  • No centralized compliance tracking
  • Benefits administered outside the HRIS
  • Policy acknowledgements tracked manually
  • Manager reports pulled manually on request
  • No single source of truth across US & India
➡️
After Rippling
  • Unified US & India workforce management
  • Automated onboarding/offboarding workflows
  • Real-time compliance tracking & alerts
  • Benefits fully integrated with payroll
  • Digital policy acknowledgements with audit trail
  • Automated manager reporting & org chart
  • PTO accruals automated for US & India policies
  • Single source of truth — zero data silos

Countries
US & India

Workflow Studio Automations Built

🧩 Onboarding Automation

Built a multi-step Workflow Studio sequence that triggered on offer acceptance — provisioning accounts, assigning onboarding tasks by role and location, routing I-9 completion, scheduling manager intro meetings, and sending Day 1 welcome messages. Zero manual intervention required.

Workflow Studio I-9 Routing Auto-Provisioning US & India

🚪 Offboarding Automation

Designed offboarding workflows that triggered on termination — auto-revoking system access, routing final pay and COBRA notices, scheduling exit surveys, notifying IT and Finance, and generating offboarding checklists by employment type and jurisdiction.

Workflow Studio Access Revocation COBRA Multi-Jurisdiction

📋 Policy Acknowledgement

Configured digital policy acknowledgement workflows in Rippling — pushing handbook updates, compliance notices, and annual policy reviews to all employees with automated reminders, completion tracking, and a full audit trail for legal and compliance purposes.

Policy Management Audit Trail Auto-Reminders Compliance-Ready

💰 Payroll Integration

Migrated payroll from ADP to Rippling — configuring US multi-state payroll across CA, CO, and TX, and connecting India payroll vendor for unified reporting. Built automated sync between compensation changes in Rippling and payroll runs, eliminating manual data entry.

ADP → Rippling US Multi-State India Payroll Auto-Sync

🏥 Benefits Administration

Integrated benefits providers (Medical, Dental, Vision, 401k) directly into Rippling — enabling self-service open enrollment, automating carrier feeds, and ensuring benefits elections flowed automatically into payroll deductions. Transitioned to Municipal Cigna with zero data loss.

Municipal Cigna Open Enrollment Carrier Feeds 401k Integration

🌍 US & India PEO / PTO

Built separate PTO policies in Rippling for US and India employees — configuring accrual rules, carryover caps, and approval workflows that accounted for India's Gratuity, Privilege Leave, Sick Leave, and Casual Leave entitlements alongside US state-specific leave laws.

US PTO India Leave Laws Gratuity Accrual Automation

📊 Compliance Tracking

Configured Rippling's compliance module to auto-track training completion, I-9 re-verification deadlines, visa expiry alerts, and mandatory state-specific notices. Built automated alerts to People Ops and managers when action was required — before deadlines, not after.

I-9 Tracking Training Completion Visa Alerts State Notices

📈 Manager Reporting & Org Data

Built automated manager reports in Rippling — headcount by department, compensation bands, tenure reports, and attrition dashboards. Configured org chart sync so leadership always had a live view of team structure. Used Rippling as the single source of truth feeding all People Ops reporting.

Headcount Reports Org Chart Attrition Dashboards Single Source of Truth
Why Rippling

“Rippling is the closest thing to a true People Operations operating system. When configured correctly, it eliminates the gap between HR decisions and execution — comp changes flow to payroll, new hires get access before Day 1, and compliance never falls through the cracks. I’ve built it from scratch and I know exactly how to make it work for a globally distributed team.”

— Catherine Nolasco, SHRM-CP

People & Culture Newsletter
